lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: Hello. How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: Mr. Vikash? I'm afraid meetings require an appointment.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: Please make an appointment through your contact first.
- A few days later -
Fiji Government Building. Third floor, Ministry of National Planning.
Five minutes before the appointment.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: Do you have an appointment with Mr. Vikash? Your name?

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: One moment, I'll check.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: ...Yes, I see it. Please take a seat.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Namaste. Have a seat.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: You're from KODA. The Naitamba Island matter, yes?

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: I only have fifteen minutes. Please get straight to it.

choices.text: "Thank you for making time during the audit. I want to understand the situation first."
"I want to know why approval is taking so long."
"I brought the project brief. Could we review it together?"
"You need to approve this quickly. Six months have passed."

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: ...The minister's approval has not been issued yet.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Naitamba Island is iTaukei communal land. There is an opinion that land consent must come first.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Our department submitted it. That point was raised above us.
It sounds like an excuse, but it may be a real procedural issue.

choices.text: "Which department needs to be coordinated with?"
"Isn't that an internal issue? How long are we supposed to wait?"

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: We're trying to process it quickly.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: But there are internal review procedures, and I can't decide this alone.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Let's stop here for today.
Vikash stands up from his seat.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: ...All right, let's see.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Naitamba Island. The land status is missing here.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: The island is iTaukei communal land. The view from above is that land office review is needed before ministerial approval.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: We can submit it, but without that part, it is very likely to be returned.
A specific bottleneck has been identified.

choices.text: "I'll check whether coordination with the land office is underway."

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: If the land office side is coordinated, we can move too.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Once that is settled, ministerial approval should move quickly.
Vikash is speaking frankly.

choices.text: "I'll share progress and work through this with you. Thank you."
"Understood. I'll come back when I have results."

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Contact me when the land office coordination is done. Once that paper trail is settled, we'll move immediately.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: We're doing what we can within the rules.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Let's stop here for today.
The meeting is over.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Once you coordinate with the land office, we'll review it again.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Ms. Wati should know the contact there.
For the first time, there is concrete progress.

choices.text: "Please tell me in advance if the documents need revisions."

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Document revisions matter. Yes, I'll organize them and send them to you.
Vikash smiles faintly. You have not seen that expression before.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: ...Yes. I'll contact you when there is a result.
For the first time, Vikash meets your eyes.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: You're here? Mr. Vikash is at his desk.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: The land office contacted us. The consent form has been received.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Ratu Josefa's signature... that didn't happen in the previous project.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: I think we can send this upward for ministerial approval. This is enough.

lines.speaker: Reception
lines.text: All finished? Thank you for coming.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: Contact me when the land office coordination is done. Once that paper trail is settled, we'll move immediately.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: ...I have nothing more to say today.

lines.speaker: Vikash
lines.text: I've said everything I need to say. Next time, make an appointment.

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: Did you meet Vikash? How did it go?

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: Land office consent is needed? Io, I knew that would be the issue.

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: But... that alone won't be enough. You need to go to the island too.

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: Even if the government approves it, it means nothing if the vanua does not accept it.

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: Kerekere, before you go - do you know sevusevu? It's the ceremony of presenting yaqona when you first meet village elders.

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: Going without yaqona is rude. Take some with you.

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: There is a street vendor near Pacific City. You can buy it there.

lines.speaker: Me
lines.text: Understood. I'll bring it.

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: You went to the island first?

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: Government approval isn't even done yet... what happened?

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: Sega na leqa. For now, meeting Vikash is urgent. Go to the government building first.

lines.speaker: Wati
lines.text: Sega na leqa, it seems to be moving along. Tell me if you need anything.
You are in front of the elevator. Which floor?
Third floor, Ministry of National Planning.
Fifth floor, Land Office.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: Hello. I'm Sela, in charge of land consent.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: The Naitamba matter? Yes, that's under my area.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: The land consent form needs the village representative's signature. Ratu Josefa's signature will do.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: For reference, APAT is also running a water project in that area. James is the person there. If you coordinate with him, the process will be smoother.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: I'll give you the form in advance. Bring Ratu Josefa's signature and we can review it right away.
Sela hands you the form. Ratu Josefa's signature is needed.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: Whether through the village or APAT, come back when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: Hello. James contacted me. This is about Naitamba Island, right?

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: The process is not complicated.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: We need a village consent form signed by Ratu Josefa.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: Here is the form. Fill it out and submit it, and we can review it right away.
Sela hands you the form. Ratu Josefa's signature is needed.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: I gave you the consent form, right? Bring Ratu Josefa's signature and I'll process it.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: Hello. James contacted me. This is about Naitamba Island, right?

lines.speaker: Me
lines.text: Yes. I already received village consent from Ratu Josefa.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: ...Already? This is the first time Ratu Josefa has signed.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: It includes a village management committee clause. This could set a good precedent.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: Submission complete. Review could finish within next week at the earliest.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: I'll also tell Vikash on the third floor. If he hears the land consent has been submitted, ministerial approval should move faster.
The land consent process has officially begun.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: At this point, we could hold a full stakeholder meeting.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: Vikash, James, and the village side - how about bringing everyone together at the KODA office?

lines.speaker: Me
lines.text: (Let's return to the KODA office and prepare the final meeting.)

lines.speaker: Me
lines.text: I brought Ratu Josefa's signature.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: ...Oh, you really got it.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: This is the first time Ratu Josefa has signed. He refused during the previous project.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: It includes a village management committee clause. This could set a good precedent.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: Submission complete. Review could finish within next week at the earliest.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: I'll also tell Vikash on the third floor. If he hears the land consent has been submitted, ministerial approval should move faster.
The land consent process has officially begun.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: At this point, we could hold a full stakeholder meeting.

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: Vikash, James, and the village side - how about bringing everyone together at the KODA office?

lines.speaker: Me
lines.text: (Let's return to the KODA office and prepare the final meeting.)

lines.speaker: Sela
lines.text: The documents have been submitted. Review is underway.
